title: ZenithUI
description: Zenith UI (a cinematic title screen mod) inspired by cyberpunk edgerunners
body:
# Preview
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e5b93c1d98fb4f9a7f6ce1b5006622cde35b656.gif)

Zenith is a client-side Fabric mod that completely replaces Minecraft's default title screen with a custom-designed interface.      
# Loading-screen replacement. 
![loading-screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3f85b1d29885f3098c0bf2aa24ff8b63daec578.gif)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
  Features                                                                                                                                                                                                           
  - Custom background image with an animated starfield overlay and vignette effect                                                                                                                                   
  - Animated typing text on the title screen                                                                                                                                                                         
  - Custom-styled buttons with a translucent dark theme and light blue hover glow
  - Icon bar with quick access to Accessibility, Language, Settings, and optionally Mods (via ModMenu) and Replays (via ReplayMod)
  - Consistent custom background applied across all menu screens
